approved_by_roshan.note: prominent placement requested; baked-in bubbles look odd -> regen without bubbles or polish out

flaw_taxonomy.F1_baked_bubbles: bubbles/droplets/gems painted INTO sprites (corals, rocks). Bubbles belong to the game's particle systems, not the art. Fix: negative prompt.
flaw_taxonomy.F2_faces_on_scenery: kawaii faces on corals/rocks/plants make scenery read as creatures and add noise. Faces stay ONLY on actual creatures. Fix: negative prompt per category.
flaw_taxonomy.F3_confetti_decals: flower/star/swirl confetti sprinkled on rocks, shells, props. Fix: negative prompt 'no decorative stickers/confetti'.
flaw_taxonomy.F4_baked_sticker_border: some sprites ship with a white die-cut border (turtle) - the game adds its own at load, causing double borders. Fix: negative prompt + polish crop.
flaw_taxonomy.F5_cluster_not_single: corals arrive as multi-blob CLUSTERS; scatter props need ONE readable piece. Fix: 'exactly one coral branch/formation'.
flaw_taxonomy.F6_tile_tessellation: terrain tiles are painterly but not seamless; visible clumps repeat. Fix: offset-blend polish pass (scripted) + regen at higher uniformity.
flaw_taxonomy.F7_palette_bleed: pastel override recolors things oddly (pink palm trunks). Acceptable sometimes; constrain trunks/wood to warm browns.
flaw_taxonomy.F8_concept_enmeshing: the named subject gets blended with OTHER concepts (rock+mushroom+candy, coral+creature) until it is not a clean representation. Worst failure class per owner. Fix: identity clause in prompt - depict ONLY the named subject, plain and readable; nothing growing on/merged into it.

pipeline_next: best-candidates cull (Roshan + analysis when quota resets) -> polish pass (tools/polish_sprite.py: alpha cutout, autocontrast, seamless-tile fix) -> targeted regen round 2 with flaw-patched prompts for roles with no usable variant

rejected_examples.note: rock rendered as candy-mushroom hybrid with swirls/flowers - identity lost
rock wearing a mushroom colony with tentacle curls - concepts enmeshed
